---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new security feature, improvement, or modernization
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ELMAALMIA
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What use case drives the request?

Example: *"As a developer deploying in a clustered environment, the in-memory rate limiter doesn't survive restarts or share state across nodes."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include any API design, configuration properties, or architectural changes.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is your proposal better?

## Security Impact

Does this change affect the security posture of the application? If so, how?

## Additional Context

Links to documentation, similar implementations, or related issues.
